title: New 3x15 Scoring System for Domestic Badminton Debuts in Ernakulam
indian_angle: This story is crucial for Indian badminton fans as it announces a significant rule change for all domestic tournaments, starting in Ernakulam.
summary: The new 3x15 scoring system for all domestic badminton tournaments in India is set to debut at an event in Ernakulam.

title: Kidambi Srikanth Finishes as Runner-Up at US Open
indian_angle: Indian fans will be interested in Kidambi Srikanth's performance, as he reached the final of a Super 300 event.
summary: Kidambi Srikanth, a prominent Indian shuttler, reached the final of the US Open but was unable to secure the title.

title: Srikanth's Sportsmanship Highlighted in US Open Final Run
indian_angle: This feature celebrates the integrity and sportsmanship of Indian star Kidambi Srikanth during his impressive run at the US Open.
summary: An article detailing a moment of exemplary sportsmanship by Kidambi Srikanth during his journey to the US Open final, where he overturned a point given to him.

title: Rounak Chouhan Upsets World No 6 at US Open
indian_angle: This highlights a significant achievement by an Indian shuttler, Rounak Chouhan, defeating a top-ranked international player.
summary: Indian shuttler Rounak Chouhan, a known Cristiano Ronaldo fan, achieved a notable victory by defeating the World No 6, Chou Tien Chen, at the US Open.

title: India's Asian Games Badminton Squad Reunites
indian_angle: Indian fans will be keen to know about the national squad preparing for the upcoming Asian Games, a major multi-sport event.
summary: The Indian Thomas Cup squad has reassembled for the Asian Games, with Treesa and Gayatri returning, alongside other key players like PV Sindhu, Lakshya, Unnati, and Satwik-Chirag.
